prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET (blacktop variant, 205hp stock) with a Tomei 260° duration camshaft set (260-EX260S) and Tomei M72 manifold for optimized exhaust flow, paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) for 350whp on 93 octane with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU controlling a 12.5:1 static compression ratio and 22psi boost.

Full chassis reinforcement with a Cusco 4-point bolt-in roll cage (S13-specific, part #601 540 A) and Cusco front strut tower bar (part #511 001 A) to eliminate flex, combined with BC Racing BR coilovers (S13-specific, 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear springs) with Swift springs and 30-way adjustable damping for drift tuning.

Drivetrain upgrade with a OS Giken Super Lock LSD (S13-specific, 1.5-way, part #OS-G213A) in a Nismo 5-speed transmission (part #32000-50A00) with a Nismo 2-way limited-slip differential (part #38420-40F00), paired with a Fidanza aluminum flywheel (10.5lb, part #161261) and Spec Stage 3+ clutch (part #SPS3P) for high-RPM engagement.
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (S13-specific, part #K201) with custom 50mm overfenders to fit Work Meister S1 3P wheels (17x9 +22 front, 17x10 +30 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear) for aggressive stance and grip.

Custom Rocket Bunny V3.5 rear bumper (S13-specific, part #RB-S13-03) with integrated diffuser and dual 3.5" exhaust exits for a JDM VIP-meets-drift aesthetic, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (S13-specific, part #CF-S13-HOOD) with a 3" cowl for weight reduction and airflow.

Interior stripped with a Bride Zeta III reclining seat (part #BRZ3-000) mounted on a Cusco bolt-in seat rail (part #791 001 A) for driver positioning, combined with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (part #51013) and a Defi BF gauge cluster (part #DF11201) for real-time monitoring of boost, oil pressure, and AFR.
